name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual tracking causes late filings and penalties. We automate payroll tax compliance instead of manual tracking and filing of payroll taxes.
problem_solved: Ensuring timely and accurate payroll tax compliance.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Ensuring timely and accurate payroll tax compliance.
